basis: Total state funds (General Fund + special funds + selected bond funds) per DOF Schedule 9 agency totals; excludes federal funds
currentLabel: FY2026-27 (2026 Budget Act, AB 109, enacted Jun 2026)

sources.label: CA DOF, 2026-27 Enacted Budget Summary Schedules (Schedule 9)
CA DOF, 2025-26 Enacted Budget Summary Schedules (Schedule 9)

notes: Each figure is the enacted budget-year column of Schedule 9 (Comparative Statement of Expenditures) from that year's Budget Act edition, so both columns are as-enacted. Agency totals sum exactly to the published enacted totals: $321.05B (2025-26) and $351.71B (2026-27) state funds.
Federal funds are excluded (shown separately in Schedule 9); including them, total spending is $495.6B (2025-26) and $538.9B (2026-27).

Business & Consumer Services and Housing & Homelessness became separate agencies in the 2026-27 budget; they are combined here to match the prior-year BCSH structure (2026-27 split: Business & Consumer Services $1.33B, Housing & Homelessness $2.24B).
Education combines TK-12 and Higher Education; DOF's Schedule 9 reports them as a single Education agency.

agencies.name: General Government (incl. tax relief, statewide expenditures)
Business, Consumer Services & Housing (incl. Housing & Homelessness)
